title: Shrimp Curry
description: A flavorful and spicy curry made with succulent shrimp, perfect for a weeknight dinner. This recipe combines the bold flavors of Indian cuisine with the richness of fermented elements.
instructions: Heat oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add the onion, ginger, and garlic, and sauté until the onion is translucent.
Add the curry powder and fermented red chili peppers, and cook for 1 minute.
Add the shrimp and cook until pink, about 2-3 minutes.
Add the coconut milk, tomatoes, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 5-7 minutes, or until the sauce has thickened.
Serve the shrimp curry over rice or with naan bread.
